title: Not able Install podman windows 10
body:
### Issue Description

We are trying to install podman version 4.9.4 in windows system when run the wsl -l -v command i can see podman and wsl vpn kit both are in installing state past one week, can you somebody help me what is going wrong here, and how to stop this installation process.

comments.body: How did you install podman? What commands have you run?
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
Hi @ashley-cui we have installed podman using exe file only in our windows machine

wsl-vpnkit is not somthing from podman AFAICS. sounds like something with your WSL is broken so you should check if your WSL works in general and llok into the windows docs on how to remove them and try again
